top_signals.title: Bond Heavyweights Target a Market Sweet Spot for New Warsh Era
top_signals.summary: Some of the biggest bond managers are zeroing in on one specific area of the market as the best place to ride out the early days of the Kevin Warsh era.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin falls below $60,000, on track for a rare back-to-back quarterly loss
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: NASA Eyes Moon Base Powered by Solar Panels and Nuclear Reactors
top_signals.summary: With major plans for space travel, several governments are proposing lunar energy production, including solar and nuclear projects. In May, NASA announced plans to send robotic landers, hopping drones, and vehicles to the moon as part of the United States government’s plans to develop a lunar base. NASA is expected to develop the machines alongside Intuitive Machines, Astrobotic, Blue Origin, and Elon Musk’s SpaceX. The United States aims to land its astronauts back on the moon before President Donald Trump leaves office in 2029, 60…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Ebola-hit DR Congo lead minnows into World Cup knockout stages
top_signals.summary: Central African team defy odds to progress alongside Cape Verde and Bosnia and Herzegovina
